channel.title: Posts on (ian)Yuang Chen
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on (ian)Yuang Chen

item.title: Start
item.description: #0. Why building this website? I’m always a lover of telling, no matter what I tell–stories, my feelings, daily routines, magics, legends–I just tell them all. So when I grow up to be a college student, with all the staff I learn from textbook, my teachers and sometimes from websites, I can’t suppress my urge to share them with people. I myself own a Wechat Subscriber named “Environmental Science and Policy” (of course the real name is in Chinese instead of English), where I post mostly my literature reading, my views on issues concerned with environmental science and policy, mostly policy.
